productDisplayName: Peter England Men Check Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Navy blue and brown check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Chuck that boredom out of your life, slip into this check casual shirt from the Oddies collection of peter england and express your ordinary in style. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Add on denims and boots, fling a biker jacket and conquer the world in style.
